---
title: "Project"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-04-09"
---

# How are housing property characteristics and location associated with housing prices?

We study how housing characteristics and location affect housing prices using Bayesian regression models. The response variable is log-transformed to reduce skewness and stabilize variance.

## Data cleaning
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

data <- read.csv("Bengaluru_House_Price_Data(main).csv")
head(data)

# 1. Remove column with too many missing values
data$society <- NULL

# 2. Extract numeric bedrooms from size
data$bedrooms <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9]", "", data$size))

# 3. Clean total_sqft
convert_sqft <- function(x) {
  if (grepl("-", x)) {
    nums <- as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(x, "-")))
    return(mean(nums))
  } else if (grepl("^[0-9.]+$", x)) {
    return(as.numeric(x))
  } else {
    return(NA)
  }
}

data$sqft <- sapply(data$total_sqft, convert_sqft)

# 4. Transform balcony 
data$balcony <- factor(data$balcony, levels = c(0,1,2,3))

# 5. Remove rows with missing key variables
data <- data[!is.na(data$sqft), ]
data <- data[!is.na(data$bath), ]
data <- data[!is.na(data$balcony), ]
data <- data[!is.na(data$bedrooms), ]
data <- data[!is.na(data$location), ]
data <- data[data$sqft > 0, ]

# 6. Frequency-based grouping for location
location_counts <- data %>%
  group_by(location) %>%
  tally(sort = TRUE)

top_18_names <- head(location_counts$location, 18)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(location_grouped = case_when(
    location %in% top_18_names ~ as.character(location),
    location_counts$n[match(location, location_counts$location)] >= 30 ~ "Other_Established",
    TRUE ~ "Other_Sparse"
  ))

# Convert to factor
all_levels <- c(as.character(top_18_names), "Other_Established", "Other_Sparse")
data$location_grouped <- factor(data$location_grouped, levels = all_levels)

# 7. Log-transform variables
data$log_price <- log(data$price)
data$log_sqft  <- log(data$sqft)  


# 8. Keep relevant variables
clean_data <- data[, c("log_price",
                       "log_sqft",
                       "balcony",
                       "location_grouped")]

# 9. Rename columns
colnames(clean_data) <- c("log_price",
                          "log_sqft",
                          "balcony",
                          "location")

# 10. Save cleaned dataset
write.csv(clean_data, "clean_housing.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 11. Check data
head(clean_data)
table(clean_data$location)

```

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(rstan)

clean_data$balcony <- factor(clean_data$balcony, levels = c(0,1,2,3))

# Create 3 dummy variables (baseline = balcony 0)
Z <- model.matrix(~ balcony, data = clean_data)[, -1]

# The data for Stan
stan_data <- list(
  N = nrow(clean_data),
  log_price = clean_data$log_price,
  log_sqft = clean_data$log_sqft,
  balcony_dummies = Z
)

# Fit model using Stan 
fit <- stan(
  file = "model1.stan",
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 123,
  refresh = 0
)

```


```{r}
# Posterior means
post <- rstan::extract(fit)

beta0_hat <- mean(post$beta0)
beta1_hat <- mean(post$beta1)
beta_balcony_hat <- colMeans(post$beta_balcony)
sigma_hat <- mean(post$sigma)

beta0_hat
beta1_hat
beta_balcony_hat
sigma_hat

# credible intervals
beta0_ci <- quantile(post$beta0, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
beta1_ci <- quantile(post$beta1, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
beta_balcony_ci <- apply(post$beta_balcony, 2, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
sigma_ci <- quantile(post$sigma, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))

beta0_ci
beta1_ci
beta_balcony_ci
sigma_ci
```
```{r}
traceplot(fit, pars = "beta0")
traceplot(fit, pars = "beta1")
traceplot(fit, pars = "sigma")

traceplot(fit, pars = "beta_balcony[1]")
traceplot(fit, pars = "beta_balcony[2]")
traceplot(fit, pars = "beta_balcony[3]")
```
```{r}
# summary diagnostics
diag_summary <- summary(
  fit,
  pars = c("beta0", "beta1", "beta_balcony", "sigma"),
  probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975)
)$summary

diag_summary[, c("mean", "sd", "n_eff", "Rhat")]
```
```{r, message=FALSE}
# Synthetic data validation

# known true parameters
beta0_true <- -3.90
beta1_true <- 1.16
beta_balcony_true <- c(-0.14, -0.13, -0.05)
sigma_true <- 0.47

# simulate synthetic response
mu_syn <- beta0_true + beta1_true * clean_data$log_sqft + Z %*% beta_balcony_true
log_price_syn <- rnorm(nrow(clean_data), mean = mu_syn, sd = sigma_true)

stan_data_syn <- list(
  N = nrow(clean_data),
  log_price = as.vector(log_price_syn),
  log_sqft = clean_data$log_sqft,
  balcony_dummies = Z
)

fit_syn <- stan(
  file = "model1.stan",
  data = stan_data_syn,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 123,
  refresh = 0
)
```

```{r}
post_syn <- rstan::extract(fit_syn)

# compare true values with posterior means
recovery_table <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c("beta0", "beta1", "beta_balcony1", "beta_balcony2", "beta_balcony3", "sigma"),
  True = c(beta0_true, beta1_true, beta_balcony_true, sigma_true),
  Estimate = c(
    mean(post_syn$beta0),
    mean(post_syn$beta1),
    colMeans(post_syn$beta_balcony),
    mean(post_syn$sigma)
  )
)

recovery_table
```

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(cmdstanr)
library(posterior)

# 

mod <- cmdstan_model("model1.stan")

fit_vi <- mod$variational(
  data = stan_data,
  seed = 123,
  algorithm = "meanfield",
  output_samples = 2000,
  refresh = 0,
  show_messages = FALSE,
  show_exceptions = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
draws_df <- as_draws_df(fit_vi$draws())

beta0_vi <- mean(draws_df$beta0)
beta1_vi <- mean(draws_df$beta1)
sigma_vi <- mean(draws_df$sigma)

beta_balcony_vi <- c(
  mean(draws_df$`beta_balcony[1]`),
  mean(draws_df$`beta_balcony[2]`),
  mean(draws_df$`beta_balcony[3]`)
)

beta0_vi
beta1_vi
beta_balcony_vi
sigma_vi
```
```{r}
# credible intervals
beta0_vi_ci <- quantile(draws_df$beta0, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
beta1_vi_ci <- quantile(draws_df$beta1, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
sigma_vi_ci <- quantile(draws_df$sigma, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))

beta_balcony_vi_ci <- rbind(
  quantile(draws_df$`beta_balcony[1]`, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)),
  quantile(draws_df$`beta_balcony[2]`, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)),
  quantile(draws_df$`beta_balcony[3]`, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
)
beta0_vi_ci
beta1_vi_ci
sigma_vi_ci
beta_balcony_vi_ci
```

```{r}
compare_table <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c("beta0", "beta1", "beta_balcony1", "beta_balcony2", "beta_balcony3", "sigma"),
  MCMC = c(beta0_hat, beta1_hat, beta_balcony_hat, sigma_hat),
  VI = c(beta0_vi, beta1_vi, beta_balcony_vi, sigma_vi)
)

compare_table
```

```{r, message=FALSE}
# Synthetic data validation (VI)

beta0_true_vi <- -2.38
beta1_true_vi <- 0.96
beta_balcony_true_vi <- c(-0.19, -0.13, -0.012)
sigma_true_vi <- 0.47

# simulate synthetic response
mu_syn_vi <- beta0_true_vi + beta1_true_vi * clean_data$log_sqft + Z %*% beta_balcony_true_vi
log_price_syn_vi <- rnorm(nrow(clean_data), mean = mu_syn_vi, sd = sigma_true_vi)

stan_data_syn_vi <- list(
  N = nrow(clean_data),
  log_price = as.vector(log_price_syn_vi),
  log_sqft = clean_data$log_sqft,
  balcony_dummies = Z
)

# fit VI on synthetic data
fit_vi_syn <- mod$variational(
  data = stan_data_syn_vi,
  seed = 123,
  algorithm = "meanfield",
  output_samples = 2000,
  refresh = 0,
  show_messages = FALSE,
  show_exceptions = FALSE
)

```

```{r}
draws_syn_vi <- as_draws_df(fit_vi_syn$draws())

# compare true values with posterior means
recovery_table_vi <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c("beta0", "beta1", "beta_balcony1", "beta_balcony2", "beta_balcony3", "sigma"),
  True_vi = c(beta0_true_vi, beta1_true_vi, beta_balcony_true_vi, sigma_true_vi),
  Estimate_vi = c(
    mean(draws_syn_vi$beta0),
    mean(draws_syn_vi$beta1),
    mean(draws_syn_vi$`beta_balcony[1]`),
    mean(draws_syn_vi$`beta_balcony[2]`),
    mean(draws_syn_vi$`beta_balcony[3]`),
    mean(draws_syn_vi$sigma)
  )
)

recovery_table_vi[,-1] <- round(recovery_table_vi[,-1], 4)
recovery_table_vi
```
